understood_request: Identify which warehouses have the most stock movement activity by counting total stock movement records and summing total quantity moved, aggregated per warehouse across all locations within each warehouse.

mart.ddl: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS mart_warehouse_stock_movement_activity (warehouse_bk VARCHAR, warehouse_name VARCHAR, city VARCHAR, capacity_sqft BIGINT, total_movement_count BIGINT, total_quantity_moved BIGINT, mart_insert_dts TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mart.populate_sql: DELETE FROM mart_warehouse_stock_movement_activity; INSERT INTO mart_warehouse_stock_movement_activity SELECT hw.warehouse_bk, swc.warehouse_name, swc.city, swc.capacity_sqft, COUNT(ssmd.movement_id) AS total_movement_count, SUM(ABS(ssmd.quantity)) AS total_quantity_moved, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS mart_insert_dts FROM hub_warehouse hw INNER JOIN sat_warehouse_capacity swc ON hw.warehouse_hk = swc.warehouse_hk INNER JOIN lnk_warehouse_location lwl ON hw.warehouse_hk = lwl.warehouse_hk INNER JOIN hub_location hl ON lwl.location_hk = hl.location_hk INNER JOIN lnk_product_location lpl ON hl.location_hk = lpl.location_hk INNER JOIN sat_stock_movement_details ssmd ON lpl.product_location_hk = ssmd.product_location_hk WHERE swc.load_end_dts IS NULL AND ssmd.load_end_dts IS NULL GROUP BY hw.warehouse_bk, swc.warehouse_name, swc.city, swc.capacity_sqft
